global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and bold text elements.
global.main_message: Encourages users to stream content for free.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large rectangle and a circle are outlined in a lighter blue, positioned centrally within the ad.

elements.label: Overlay rectangle
elements.description: A slightly smaller rectangle is placed over the geometric shapes, creating a layered effect.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangle is positioned slightly above the center, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The text 'Stream the hype' is prominently displayed in bold, white font at the center of the ad.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle is located towards the bottom left, adding a decorative element to the composition.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The phrase 'Start free today' is written in bold white text beneath the main headline, encouraging user engagement.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype Start free today

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: The logo 'StarVault' is displayed in a bold font at the top left corner, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Learn more' is positioned at the bottom center, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' is located at the top right, drawing attention to a promotional offer.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' is placed at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern minimalist with bold colors, key elements include geometric shapes and a strong call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, with the main subject shapes behind it, and the CTA buttons are at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype, Start free today, StarVault, Learn more, SALE, UGC
